2605.04583.title: TajikNLP: An Open-Source Toolkit for Comprehensive Text Processing of Tajik (Cyrillic Script)
2605.04583.paper_summary: The Tajik language, written in Cyrillic script, remains severely under-resourced in terms of publicly available natural language processing (NLP) toolkits, hindering both linguistic research and applied development. This paper introduces TajikNLP, an open-source Python library that provides the first comprehensive pipeline for processing authentic Tajik text while preserving the original Cyrillic orthography. The library implements a modular architecture centered around a unified Doc object, enabling sequential application of components for cleaning, normalization, tokenization (including subword BPE), morphemic segmentation, part-of-speech tagging, stemming, lemmatization, and sentence splitting. A novel unified morphology engine is introduced, offering controlled and deep analysis modes that significantly improve handling of Tajik's agglutinative nominal and verbal inflections. The release further incorporates a lexicon-based sentiment analyser and pre-trained Word2Vec/FastText embeddings loaded directly from the Hugging Face Hub. To ensure reproducibility and facilitate future research, four accompanying linguistic datasets -- a POS-tagged corpus (52.5k entries), a sentiment lexicon (3.5k entries), a toponym gazetteer (5.6k entries), and a personal names dataset (3.8k entries) -- have been openly published under permissive licenses. The library's reliability is validated by an extensive test suite of 616 automated tests achieving 93% source code coverage. TajikNLP thus establishes a foundational technological infrastructure for Tajik language processing, lowering the barrier to entry for both academic and industrial applications in low-resource Cyrillic-script environments.
2605.04583.paper_summary_zh: 塔吉克語以西里爾字母書寫，在公共可用的自然語言處理（NLP）工具包方面仍然資源不足，這阻礙了語言研究和應用開發。本文介紹了TajikNLP，一個開源的Python庫，提供了處理真實塔吉克文本的第一個全面管道，同時保留原始的西里爾正字法。該庫實現了一種以統一Doc對象為中心的模塊化架構，能夠順序應用組件進行清理、標準化、分詞（包括子詞BPE）、形態學分段、詞性標註、詞幹提取、詞形還原和句子拆分。引入了一種新穎的統一形態學引擎，提供受控和深度分析模式，顯著改善了塔吉克語的黏著名詞和動詞屈折的處理。該版本還包含了一個基於詞典的情感分析器和直接從Hugging Face Hub加載的預訓練Word2Vec/FastText嵌入。為了確保可重複性並促進未來的研究，四個伴隨的語言數據集——一個詞性標註語料庫（52.5k條目）、一個情感詞典（3.5k條目）、一個地名詞典（5.6k條目）和一個人名數據集（3.8k條目）——已在寬鬆的許可證下公開發佈。該庫的可靠性通過一個包含616個自動化測試的廣泛測試套件得到了驗證，實現了93%的源代碼覆蓋率。因此，TajikNLP為塔吉克語處理建立了一個基礎的技術基礎設施，降低了在資源匱乏的西里爾字母環境中學術和工業應用的進入門檻。
2605.04583.author: Mullosharaf K. Arabov et.al.
